value: Farming management using GPS, sensors, and analytics. Factors: soil moisture, nutrients, pests, weather, planting density.
Soil condition including pH, organic matter, microbiome. Affects root development and nutrient uptake.
Consensus despite Byzantine failures. Requires n >= 3f+1 nodes. Formulated by Lamport, Shostak, Pease (1982).
Practical BFT by Castro & Liskov (1999). Three phases: pre-prepare, prepare, commit. Used in permissioned blockchains.
Criminal defense: act prevented greater harm. Requirements: imminent threat, no legal alternative, proportionality, not self-created.
ALI statutory text. Section 3.02 codifies choice of evils defense.
